author: Siliconera
text:
Genshin Impact Luna VIII Update Special Program Airs This Week
The Genshin Impact Luna VIII Special Program will air this week and reintroduce Sandrone and what appears to be two new costumes.

author: Siliconera
text:
All 4 Kairosoft 30th Anniversary Game Bundles Now on Steam
Kairosoft released four game bundles, each with four titles, on Steam as part of its 30th anniversary celebration.

author: Siliconera
text:
Some English Persona 4 Revival Voice Actors Revealed
We now know five of the English voice actors for Persona 4 Revival, including who will be the new voice of Golden addition Marie.

author: Siliconera
text:
New Honkai: Star Rail Nendoroids Are Anaxa and Phainon
The next Honkai: Star Rail Nendoroids are a standard Anaxa figure and a Nendoroid Doll of Phainon.

author: Siliconera
text:
Live-Action Kiki’s Delivery Service Show in Development
Following the novel and anime film adaptation by Studio Ghibli, there will be a Kadokawa and BBC live-action Kiki's Delivery Service.

author: Siliconera
text:
Identity V Neo Series Pop Up Store Heading to Book Off USA
Identity V merchandise is now available in pop up shop locations at Book Off USA locations in two states.

author: Siliconera
text:
My Hero Academia Anime 10th Anniversary Plus Ultra Movie Shared
Toho and Bones shared a new animated short to celebrate the 10th anniversary of the My Hero Academia anime.

author: Siliconera
text:
DoDonPachi Resurrection Reignite Is Getting Battle Royale Mode
Up to ten players will be able to join the fray.

author: Siliconera
text:
Preview: Paralives Feels More Like an RPG Than Life Sim
The foundations are fun, but there are still some growing pains.
